name: Fruit Cocktail Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream together sugar and eggs. Add fruit cocktail and vanilla; mix well.
2. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, and salt to the creamed mixture and mix well.
3. Pour the batter into a greased jellyroll pan. Sprinkle with coconut and walnuts.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until tested done with a toothpick. Cool for 10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a saucepan, bring sugar, butter (or margarine), and milk to a boil. Remove from heat; add vanilla and mix well.
6. Drizzle the glaze over warm cake. Allow it to cool before cutting into bars.
Note: Instead of the glaze mentioned here, you can also make a simple glaze of powdered sugar, milk, and lemon juice for the topping. It's good either way.
